text.cn: 兵馬俑、回民街、城牆——每條路線的時間與『被導遊攔截概率』都不同。
text.en: Terracotta Army, Muslim Quarter, City Wall — each route costs different time and tourist-trap odds.

text.cn: 兵馬俑：提防『一日遊』與強制購物（半日到一日）。
text.en: Terracotta Army: dodge day-tours and forced shopping (half to full day).

text.cn: 回民街：排隊吃肉夾饃/涼皮（晚上更熱鬧）。
text.en: Muslim Quarter: queue for rou jia mo / liangpi (livelier at night).

text.cn: 騎行/步行城牆：風大、日落美、腿會抗議。
text.en: Bike/walk the wall: windy, sunset pretty, legs complain.

text.cn: 有人塞給你『免費接駁』傳單。語氣太熟練，熟練得像劇本。
text.en: Someone hands you a 'free shuttle' flyer. The pitch is too polished — scripted.

text.cn: 識破並拒絕（你有攻略/本地判斷）。
text.en: Spot it and refuse (guides/local sense help).

lockedHint.en: Being able to check reviews helps

text.cn: 西安的歷史很長，詐騙話術也很長。你活著離開景點，就算贏。
text.en: Xi'an's history is long — so are scam scripts. Leaving the site alive counts as a win.
